specify.reviewerNotes: 3 non-blocking suggestions: FR-3 step 2.5 fractional numbering; AC-8 redundant with AC-38/39; FR-7 step 4 uuid4 pin

design.reviewerNotes: 3 non-blocking suggestions: spec/design step numbering off-by-one (FR-7 vs §7.1); LEFT JOIN invariant query NULL semantics; autofill trigger silent-NULL acknowledged via wp_reject_orphaned_insert

create-plan.reviewerNotes: task-reviewer APPROVED iter 2 with 3 suggestions (Estimated→Complexity, Task 5.10 split, FR-10 mid-phase audit). plan-reviewer iter 2 had 3 editorial blockers fixed in commit (Phase B count, T-B0 visibility, spec/design step numbering convention). phase-reviewer iter 2: 3 non-blocking warnings (Task 8.1 deps could include 6.8-6.11+5.7, Task 6.3 transitive dep note, Phase F internal split in Mermaid). All addressable in implement phase or deferred to post-merge cleanup.

finish.reviewerNotes: QA gate OVERRIDE: 9 HIGH (3 runtime-breakers fixed, 6 deferred to backlog 00360-00366), 22 MED filed 00367-00388, 14 LOW in sidecar. Released v4.17.0. complete_phase MCP unavailable in session (broken via backlog 00363 territory) so .meta.json updated via guard-fallback path.
